Data Flow Description: DNS daemon streams dnstap query/response telemetry frames to the Vector receiver
Encryption: None (private internal L3 path; on-host sinks)
Business Justification: Always-on out-of-band DNS telemetry replaces reactive query logging that degrades DNS performance; feeds Splunk (audit/forensics) and Prometheus (ops metrics)

Data Flow Description: Same dnstap stream to the parallel DNS-collector receiver for A/B validation and instant fallback
Encryption: None (private internal L3 path; on-host sinks)
Business Justification: Parallel/standby receiver enabling zero-downtime failover and side-by-side validation against the Vector receiver
